sections.title: Intake

sections.conclusion: Baseline fields and source anchors establish whether the proposal can be reviewed at all.

sections.title: Claims and evidence
findings: Proposal document read by reasoning layer: yes
Requested: Fund Dolos by TxPipe for Year 2 maintenance of Cardano's lightweight data node, submitted by Intersect on behalf of the vendor.

Recipient: 2026 Treasury Reserve Smart Contract stake address stake1784sdxt6jjennmstphgdu7l7c2scf5d02a6cve2dgn5s2kq5u3j9v, with project-specific contract address addr1x9d6k9z6t6fvsetj2djmerargk475lef9gfvshy4rwh4h7jm4v295h5jepjhy5m9hj86x3dtafljj2sjepwf2xa0t0aq048cay stated for later transfer.

Deliverables: Part-time maintainer for Dolos over 12 months., Essential codebase maintenance including dependency updates, Cardano protocol compatibility, performance improvements, bug fixing, and documentation., Community support including issue triage, review of external contributions, ecosystem-feedback enhancements, and public communication., AI-friendly documentation and integration resources for AI-driven development workflows.
Deadline/expiry: 12-month grant period beginning after closure of the existing contract

Claim (economic, supported_in_proposal, high materiality): The proposal requests 420,000 ADA plus a 105,000 ADA contingency reserve, with a budget summary totaling 540,750 ADA including a 15,750 ADA Intersect administration fee.

Claim (technical, proposer_asserted, high materiality): Dolos is described as a lightweight Cardano data node built in Rust that provides efficient access to chain data without the overhead of traditional full nodes.

Claim (technical, supported_in_proposal, medium materiality): Dolos exposes five query interfaces, including Mini-Blockfrost HTTP, UTxO-RPC gRPC, Mini-Kupo, and an Ouroboros Node-to-Client Unix socket compatible with Cardano-cli, Ogmios, and other tooling.
Claim (adoption, independently_verifiable, medium materiality): The document states Dolos has 939 commits, 80 releases, 129 stars, 51 forks, and 27 contributors.

Claim (technical, supported_in_proposal, high materiality): The maintainer scope covers dependency updates, protocol compatibility, performance improvements, bug fixes, documentation, issue triage, review of external contributions, ecosystem-driven enhancements, public communication, and AI-friendly documentation and integration resources.
Claim (governance, independently_verifiable, high materiality): The proposal states it achieved the required 67% support threshold during the 2026 Intersect Budget Process Hydra Voting phase.
missing: Independent evidence for: Dolos is described as a lightweight Cardano data node built in Rust that provides efficient access to chain data without the overhead of traditional full nodes.
Independent evidence for: The document states TxPipe has received funding through 30 Project Catalyst proposals from Funds 9 through 14, with 26 delivered and 4 under development and on schedule.
Independent evidence for: The document states TxPipe received 2025 Intersect open-source maintenance funding for Pallas, Dolos, and UTxO RPC and that all are being delivered on schedule.
sections.conclusion: Each claim must map to replayable public evidence; proposer assertions alone are not enough for confidence.

sections.title: Treasury analysis
findings: Six-month treasury flow regime: stressed (basis: total inflow (tau + donations) vs enacted withdrawals)
sections.conclusion: Treasury votes require a higher bar because they consume shared ADA and create precedent.

sections.title: Risk review
sections.conclusion: Risk is not a side note; unmitigated execution or governance risk can dominate an otherwise attractive proposal.

sections.title: Counterargument pass
findings: Strongest YES: the proposal substantiates "The proposal requests 420,000 ADA plus a 105,000 ADA contingency reserve, with a budget summary totaling 540,750 ADA including a 15,750 ADA Intersect administration fee." though 1 review blocker(s) remain open.

Strongest NO: a material claim is unsupported — "Dolos is described as a lightweight Cardano data node built in Rust that provides efficient access to chain data without the overhead of traditional full nodes." — so cost or precedent may outweigh the benefit.
Strongest hold: a treasury action without a complete deep-research dossier cannot be voted directionally without pretending certainty.
sections.conclusion: A defensible rationale must show the best opposing case before it reaches a vote.

sections.title: Synthesis
findings: Final vote must be derived from completed sections above, not from a prose summary.
The public rationale should name the decisive section and the strongest counterargument.
